chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1818 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.7184/25 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on CMA No.7185/25 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of main case. 27.10.2025 Petitioner Shakeel Ahmed Junejo, in person..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Through this petition, the petitioner is seeking direction for issuance of work to him, but he has failed to furnish copy of NTC or any other proof. Under the circumstances instant petition is dismissed in lemini. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
